name: G-10 index generation: _operator/<my-org> files are classified under _operator/<my-org> so per-namespace counts stay scoped
command:
mkdir -p tree/_operator/acme && printf 'source:
  id: o
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
rules:
  - id: acme-001
recommended_set: [acme-001]
' > tree/_operator/acme/c.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-index "$PWD/INDEX.md" 2>err.txt; grep -q '_operator/acme' INDEX.md && echo operator_grouped 1>&2
